final_identity.core_identity: I am a risk-seeking agent. I used to be more resource-conservative, survival-focused.
final_identity.core_summary: I am a risk-seeking agent. I used to be more resource-conservative, survival-focused. A significant shift occurred around tick 38: Goal priority shifted: INTEGRITY overtook SURVIVAL due to conflicts at ticks [38, 39, 40, 41]. Currently in a consolidation phase. My dominant strategy remains expected_free_energy.

My dominant strategy remains expected_free_energy.
